method: CP-PPO (critical-path-guided PPO with iterated search distillation)
note: CP-PPO diagnoses and fixes the reproduced PF-MPPO failure: time-aware per-pair features (wait, transfer, compute, earliest-finish-time, upward rank), a permutation-equivariant PairScoringNetwork, a telescoping makespan reward (gamma=1), and distillation of best-of-N rollout search. Evaluated on the corrected list-scheduling simulator against strengthened HEFT/Min-Min (upward rank + true EFT incl. communication and predecessor wait). Servable policy committed as cp_ppo.pt; benchmark by benchmarks/b1_scheduler/eval_cp_ppo.py.

results_makespan_15t_4vm.note: lower is better; identical DAGs across methods; best-of-32 rows share an equal rollout budget

dataset.env: synthetic DAG / list-scheduling simulator (standard for scheduling RL)
dataset.note: training and benchmark run in simulation; the trained policy is served for live placement (backend/app/services/cp_ppo_inference.py)
